objective: Issue a real in-game campaign-map travel command toward the selected settlement and emit a compact result artifact.

blockers.status file missing: Launch/map-ready workflow did not produce BlacksmithGuild_Status.json. Fix launch or wait phase before route logic.
blockers.campaignReady is false: Inspect campaign lifecycle and map-ready gating.
blockers.mapStateActive is false: Game reached a non-map surface. Fix surface transition or launch target.
blockers.safeToExecuteTravel is false: Inspect GameSessionState and travel safety classifier.
blockers.nextPlannedBranch is not travel: Inspect recursive branch selector and route council target emission.
blockers.targetSettlement missing: Inspect route council or branch state target emission.
blockers.route cert missing after map-ready: In-mod route executor did not start or did not write a route cert. Inspect MapTradeAutonomousService.OnCampaignTick.
blockers.travelCommandIssued is false: Movement driver did not accept the command. Inspect CampaignMapMovementHelper.TryMoveToSettlement.
blockers.routeStarted is false: Cert exists, but route service did not claim start. Inspect route cert model and writer.

handoffPrompt: Read artifacts/latest/route-visible-start.result.json. Patch only the exact blocker named by blockedReason or nextPatchHint. Do not ask for a full collector run. If commands assume Bannerlord should not be running, include ForgeStop first.
